title: Poppy Playtime CatNap
description: A small mod that adds Catnap from the game Poppy Playtime
body: The mod adds two mobs from the game Poppy Playtime Chapter 3: Catnap and Mini Catnap. Catnap is a creepy monster that will slowly chase you and poison you with red gas. Mini Catnap is a harmless and cute version of the original. The mod also adds a new potion (Red Gas), and a new gas mask item.
